auth_retry.title: Authentication retry
auth_retry.description: Trying different authentication keys for device {mac} ({model}).

abort.cooker_not_found:
No Redmond devices found.

💡 Check:
1. Device is powered on and in pairing mode
2. Bluetooth adapter is working
3. Device is within range (3-5 meters)
4. Try restarting the device
abort.cant_connect: Unable to connect to device. Check that the device is powered on and in pairing mode.
abort.cant_auth: Unable to authenticate. Check that the device is in pairing mode.

error.cooker_not_found:

💡 Check:
1. Device is powered on and in pairing mode
2. Bluetooth adapter is working
3. Device is within range (3-5 meters)
4. Try restarting the device
error.cant_connect: Unable to connect to device. Check that the device is powered on and in pairing mode.
error.cant_auth: Unable to authenticate. Check that the device is in pairing mode.
